name: Keep It Simple Consulting CO. LLC
description_short: Keep It Simple Consulting Co. LLC is a Credit Consultants Association member offering credit repair and consulting services based in Charlotte, NC.
description_long:
Keep It Simple Consulting Co. LLC operates as a credit consulting firm and maintains membership in the Credit Consultants Association (CCA), a professional organization for credit repair professionals. The company is located in Charlotte, North Carolina, and is represented by Nakeea Grisson, listed as a key contact. The firm's inclusion in the CCA's A-List Members directory suggests it meets the association's standards for professional credential and ethical practice in the credit consulting industry.

Based on their CCA membership and categorization, Keep It Simple Consulting Co. LLC provides credit repair and credit consulting services. These typically include credit report analysis, dispute filing for inaccurate items, and guidance on improving credit profiles. The company can be contacted via their professional email for inquiries about their specific service offerings.

The company distinguishes itself through formal association membership with the Credit Consultants Association, which provides credibility within the credit repair industry. CCA membership generally indicates adherence to professional standards and ethical guidelines in credit consulting practice. Their Charlotte, NC location serves the local and regional market.

Limited public information is currently available on the company's website landing page. Prospective clients should request detailed service descriptions, fee structures, and specific methodology directly from the company. Like all credit repair firms, clients should verify services offered and understand that legitimate credit repair requires documented inaccuracies on credit reports—legitimate negative items cannot be removed through dispute alone.
address: 3557 N Sharon Amity Rd Suite 101, Charlotte, NC 28205

pros: Credit Consultants Association member in good standing
Listed on CCA's A-List Members directory
Established local presence in Charlotte, NC
Named representative (Nakeea Grisson) associated with firm
cons: Minimal public information available on website about specific services
No fee structure or pricing details published
Limited transparency about dispute methodology or success rates
No client testimonials or case studies visible on directory listing
Unclear scope of services beyond general 'credit consulting' label
best_for: Consumers in the Charlotte, NC area seeking local credit repair services
People with documented errors on their credit reports requiring professional disputes
Individuals wanting to work with a CCA-affiliated credit consultant
diagnosis: Keep It Simple Consulting Co. LLC is best for consumers in the Charlotte area who want credit repair services from a CCA-affiliated professional. The main caveat is that minimal service details are publicly available—contact the firm directly to confirm they can address your specific credit issues before engaging their services.
